title: Hover Image (ImgHover)
text: Hover Image (ImgHover) The image that is displayed when the mouse cursor rests on the button or tab. ImgHover = " @ ImageFile | ^ GlyphName " Usage Dynamic? Yes Supported in Grid? No Dependencies: This property only works when a Default Image is set. For command buttons, this property is supported only when the Representation property is set to Uniface. Example: Setting in ProcScript $fieldproperties(FLD1) = "ImgDefault=@filesave.png ; ImgHover=@filesave_hover.png" Copy Applies To CommandButton utabex (TabEx) Related Links Default Image (ImgDefault) The image that is displayed as the button or tab. Representation This property determines the appearance of the command button when running on the Microsoft Windows operating system (XP and later versions). One of Windows (default), Uniface, or Header. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
